role_title: Head of Revenue and Growth, Canada

level_signals: Serves as senior Stripe leader and executive sponsor for key customer and partner relationships
Part of the Americas go-to-market leadership team
Leads Account Executives and supporting roles across Canada

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of people management experience, ideally leading sales teams in Canada or broader North American markets
must_haves.qualifier: ideally leading sales teams in Canada or broader North American markets

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience leading Sales organizations in a high-growth technology environment
Experience building and scaling high-caliber teams, including launching or growing market presence in new regions
Ability to hire, train, and coach a high-performance sales team
Demonstrated quantitative and analytical skills with a strong command of pipeline and forecast management
Deep understanding of the Canadian business landscape, including key industries, regulatory environment, and enterprise customer dynamics

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Prior experience at a growth-stage internet or software company
Prior experience in enterprise sales, partnerships, and/or business development in Canada
Prior experience in the payments industry, card issuing, or financial services
Established executive-level network within the Canadian business community
Bilingual (English/French) is an asset, particularly for engaging customers in Quebec

scope.surface: Canada go-to-market: end-to-end sales strategy and execution for the Canadian market across startups and enterprise
core_responsibilities: Serve as senior Stripe leader and executive sponsor for key customer and partner relationships across Canada
Own and drive sales growth across Canada through strong leadership, organizational planning, and outstanding execution
Oversee the expansion and satisfaction of Stripe's existing Canadian customers while pursuing new logo growth
Develop and refine Stripe's Canada-specific go-to-market strategy
Make hiring decisions, shaping candidate profile and onboarding strategy
Lead a senior team of Account Executives and indirectly lead supporting roles
Develop the long-term vision and strategy for the Canadian market
Champion Stripe's sales methodology and process, driving best practices on selling, forecasting, and pipeline management
Act as Stripe's market presence in Canada, engaging with local business community, partners, and industry stakeholders

green_flags: Clear ownership of a defined geography (Canada) with executive-level authority
Role is part of Americas GTM leadership team, signaling high strategic visibility
Stripe explicitly states preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement — encourages broader applicant pool
Payments and fintech domain experience listed as preferred (not required), lowering barrier for strong sales leaders from adjacent industries
red_flags: Location / city not specified in JD — unclear whether role is remote, hybrid, or onsite in Canada
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from scope, team leadership, and Americas GTM leadership membership)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
ambiguities: Role title in JD header is 'Head of Revenue and Growth, Canada' but body consistently refers to 'Head of Sales - Canada' — may reflect a title discrepancy or informal usage; using the official title from the header.
Location (city/province in Canada) is not specified anywhere in the JD. Could be Toronto, Vancouver, or remote-Canada. Marked as unclear.
Whether the role requires physical presence in Canada vs. being Canada-market-focused is not stated.
